subcodes.title: Words to a man from Russia, spoken on 1912-11-01
subcodes.first_line: Do not speak ill of Russia. Render good to friend and foe alike. Say that you are one with all. Be a true well-wisher of people.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از روس بد مگو با دشمن و دوست هر دو نکوئی کن بگو من با همه یگانه‌ام بدل خیر خواه عموم باش
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @love and unity
